fields.helpText: Name of a file that contains HL7 message to be deployed by MFS.

The name of the domain to which this file belongs. Note: If automated checksum processing is implemented for Text File Deployment, this field should be re-typed as a pointer to the MD5 CODE SYSTEM (.01) field in the MD5 Signature File (4.005) File.
The pre-load hexadecimal checksum for this file.
The post-load hexadecimal checksum for this file.

fields.setOfCodes: 0:NOT LOADED;1:LOADED;-1:PRE-LOAD CHECKSUM ERROR;-2:POST-LOAD CHECKSUM ERROR;-3:ERROR DURING LOAD;
fields.helpText: This field indicates if this file has been deployed on this system.
This field indicates if the file has been downloaded from the ftp server.
Date and time that this file was loaded on this system.
